_meta.purpose: Sample SKU brief for development, testing, and demo runs
_meta.data_origin: Fictional CPG product specified in .claude/plans/phase-02-core-pipeline.md Task 2. The 'Organic Trail Mix' brand, 'Original' and 'Dark Chocolate' flavor variants, 'us-west' region, and listed attributes were chosen to represent a realistic health-food CPG product brief — the kind of input Adobe GenStudio packaging automation would receive from a brand manager. No real brand is implied.
design_rationale: Two product variants (Original + Dark Chocolate) satisfy the exercise requirement of demonstrating multi-SKU generation in a single pipeline run
Health-food category (trail mix) is brand-agnostic and avoids any IP/trademark concerns
Attributes [organic, non-gmo, high-protein, gluten-free] are common CPG label claims that exercise the text overlay compositing across all four badge types
us-west region was chosen to differ from the AWS deployment region (us-east-1) to verify region-parameterized S3 key paths work correctly

products.name: Organic Trail Mix
products.description: Classic blend of nuts, seeds, and dried fruit for sustained energy

products.name: Organic Trail Mix
products.description: Premium trail mix with fair-trade dark chocolate chips and antioxidant-rich berries
